text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the Fan Fest, an overly excited Haru Urara
competes in a variety of different racing events.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... the tire pull is finally over!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And, and... I came in last!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, right, right. That tire was sooo heavy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I lost in the bunny hop, carrot picking, and pipe
rolling too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara just keeps losing. Shouldn't she just
call it quits?

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: How dare you say that! Urara never gives up!

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Urara! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Yeah, there's still hope! Keep going!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! Give it your best shot, Haru Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Everyone's cheering even harder than
before! But I'm losing... So why?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every time Haru Urara appears at an event, the
crowd goes wild. They love watching her
unrelenting drive to keep going no matter how
many times she loses.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: If I win now, I'm sure they'll be even happier!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm great at the mud run, so I'm sure I'll win!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Now onto the Fan Fest's main event, the mud run!
The Umamusume will have to run through thick
muck!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Haru Urara is off with a bang! Looks like she
still has plenty of energy left after all those
events! It seems like she's taking an early lead!
Let's see how that plays out for her!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: URARARARARA!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Nooo! Last again! My plan to take the lead as a
front runner was a huge failure!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm sure my fans are all disappointed...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Awww, that was so close too! You'll get it next time for sure!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Show us more of that classic Urara spunk!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What?! They're cheering even louder!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: They...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
They're looking forward to seeing my next race!
Then I gotta do my best!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I was gonna take a break, but never mind! I need
to find another event to join!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Daaash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how plucky Haru Urara may be, it's not
good if she pushes herself too hard. I rush over
and finally manage to slow her down...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yaaaay! I did it! I got first!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That mud was so heavy, so I decided to sprint
right out the gates!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I figured running super fast is just as tiring as
running with stuff weighing me down!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So then I ran and ran and ran. It was exhausting,
but I gave it my all!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Heeheehee! Guess I became my own trainer
there!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara has ended her losing streak! Her
efforts finally paid off!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Show us that fighting spirit in the next race, too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Look how happy they all are! Heehee, I'm
glad I tried so hard!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I promise I won't lose, so please come
and watch my future races!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara shows the audience the fruits of her
labor and is rewarded with a pumped-up crowd!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the event, Haru Urara has a meet-and-greet
with her fans.

text_block_list.name: Child
text_block_list.text: Urara, you like carrots, right? Here you go!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow, really? Yay! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Child
text_block_list.text:
My mom told me not to give you snacks, but this
is okay, right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: She did? I'm sure it's fine!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee... You can give me as many snacks as you
want!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch Haru Urara spending time with her
fans, I hear some voices talking behind me.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara is so popular. Makes sense, she's
really cute...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
She said she wants to compete in the Arima
Kinen. She's sure to make it in, given how popular
she is.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
What?! There's no way! She may be cute, but she
isn't that good.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Well, I heard there's a fan vote. As long as she
gets enough votes, there's a chance.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
A vote, huh? I'd probably vote for her. She's just
so cute!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A fan vote? That's definitely one way to increase
our chances, but...

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Oooh, so there is a way! I've got to tell the others!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I recognize the shopkeeper as part of Haru
Urara's fan club. I open my mouth to say
something, but they're already gone.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Trainer, Trainer! They want a group picture!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Can you give us a countdown and take the
picture?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All in all, the fans are overjoyed with Haru Urara's
performance. The Fan Fest was a huge success!
